title: helenium campestre
intro: Helenium campestre, also known as Common Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems, thanks to its expectorant properties, which help relieve congestion and coughs. Helenium campestre can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has also been used as a poultice to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
